---
applyTo: "docs/**/*.md"

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_ai_collab_docs.py. Edit metadata in that script. -->

# Copilot Instructions: Docs Workflow

- For complex design work, use `docs/<topic>/design.md` and
  `docs/<topic>/tasks.md` instead of a root-level task file.

- Treat `docs/engineering-baseline.md` as an evergreen repository reference,
  not as a topic-scoped design doc.

- Reference the design doc from `tasks.md` and use markdown checkboxes to
  track progress.

- When `tasks.md` exists, update it as work progresses and keep it aligned
  with the actual implementation state.

- If docs change implementation expectations, update the nearest AI
  instruction files when they become stale.
